## **TZ2.3. SECTION 3 -- REGULATORY RESULT**

### **TZ2.3.1. ENAV NET GAIN/LOSS ON ACTIVITY IN THE ITALY TERMINAL CHARGING ZONE 2 IN 2025**

ENAV reported a net gain of +4.5 M€, as a combination of a gain of +7.8 M€ arising from the cost sharing mechanism, with a loss of -3.5 M€ arising from the traffic risk sharing mechanism and a gain of +0.3 M€ relating to financial incentives.

### **TZ2.3.2. ENAV OVERALL REGULATORY RESULT (RR) ON ACTIVITY IN THE TERMINAL CHARGING ZONE 2**

Ex-post, the overall RR, taking into account the net gain from the terminal activity mentioned above (+4.5 M€) and the actual RoE (+5.5 M€), amounts to +10.0 M€ (7.4% of the terminal revenues). The resulting ex-post rate of return on equity is 13.7%, which is higher than the 7.6% planned in the PP.

### **TZ2.3.3. NOTES**

#### **TZ2.3.3.1. NOTE 1**

#### **TZ2.3.3.2. NOTE 2**
